/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/TorManager.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/TorManager.dir/TorManager_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TorManager.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TorManager.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TorManager.dir/dns_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TorManager.dir/tgbot_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TorManager.dir/mtproxymanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TorManager.dir/client_stats.cpp.o -o TorManager  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Sql.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Positioning.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
